title: Instrumented PRMP Mechanism Analysis: Information Filtering vs Implicit Regularization on Amazon Dataset
summary: Demo notebook analyzing Predictive Residual Message Passing (PRMP) mechanism on Amazon Video Games dataset. Loads pre-computed experiment results comparing three GNN variants (standard SAGEConv, PRMP, no-subtraction) across 3 seeds x 100 epochs. Visualizes training curves, per-review prediction errors, aggregated RMSE comparison, and mutual information filtering ratios. Mini dataset contains 15 review-level predictions and 4 variant summaries with thinned epoch diagnostics.
